text: Science has a clearer story about protein folding diseases than social media does. Proteins are like intricate puzzles. If they fold incorrectly, the consequences can be dire. Diseases like Alzheimer's and Parkinson's stem from these misfolded proteins. Research shows that even slight changes in the protein structure can lead to severe brain damage. Understanding these diseases helps scientists develop better treatments and possibly even cures. Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of science? Like and follow for more!
